# FIX-002: Password Policy Mismatch in Change Password Page

## Problem

Frontend change password form accepted passwords without special characters, while backend validation requires a special character.

## Root Cause

The Zod schema in `ChangePasswordPage.tsx` validated uppercase, lowercase, and numeric characters, but did not include a special-character regex.

## Fix

Added special-character validation in the frontend Zod schema:

- File: `apps/frontend/src/features/auth/pages/ChangePasswordPage.tsx`
- Change: add `.regex(/[@$!%*?&#]/, 'Harus mengandung karakter spesial')`

## Validation

- Frontend lint: passed
- Frontend typecheck: passed
- Backend lint: passed

## Date

2026-04-13
